instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that composes a sidebar from static includes: `partials/nav-profile.ftl`, a dynamic list of `shortcuts`, then `partials/nav-footer.ftl`. Escape shortcut labels and hrefs in the list loop.
code:
<#-- Model: shortcuts: sequence of { label, href } -->
<#include "partials/nav-profile.ftl">
    <#list shortcuts![] as link>
  • ${link.label?html}
<#include "partials/nav-footer.ftl">
